content.json:
# Inter-Region Egress — VNet Peering & Gateway Bandwidth
**Theme:** Egress monitoring between Azure regions · **Data source:** `AzureMetrics` (peering/gateway metrics) + `AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL`.

Peering inbound/outbound bytes, utilization, denied-by-peering flows, and top peering links.

> Combine with the cost estimator (workbook 22) — global VNet peering carries cross-region egress charges.

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName in ('VnetBytesIn', 'VnetBytesOut', 'BytesInDDoS', 'BytesOutDDoS') | summarize Bytes=sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), MetricName | render timechart
content.title: VNet/peering bytes in/out over time

content.query: AzureMetrics | where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.NETWORK' and MetricName endswith 'Bytes' | summarize AvgBytes=avg(Average), MaxBytes=max(Maximum) by Resource, MetricName | sort by MaxBytes desc
content.title: Per-resource bandwidth (avg / max)

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and FlowStatus_s == 'D' | summarize DeniedFlows=count(), Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d) by Src1_Region_s, Dest_Region_s | sort by DeniedFlows desc
content.title: Denied flows by region pair

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize Bytes=sum(OutboundBytes_d), Flows=count() by NSGList_s | top 25 by Bytes desc
content.title: Top NSGs/links by cross-region volume
